publisher: Lu Ming trading as Shane Game
intro: Enjoy a playground where ragdolls, robots, and physics collide spectacularly.
description:
Ragdoll Playground Sandbox is a 2D physics sandbox built for experimentation, creativity, and pure chaos. Test explosions, run vehicle crash scenarios, or simply observe how objects behave under realistic physical forces.

You are completely free in your actions. Create scenes, place objects, remove them at any time, and experiment with physics without limits. Weapons, explosives, vehicles, human and robot models interact dynamically, creating unpredictable and often spectacular results.

Features:
• Full sandbox with no objectives, rules, or restrictions
• Realistic 2D physics with dynamic collisions and forces
• Ragdoll-based human and robot models reacting to impacts, falls, and explosions
• Destructible objects affected by weight, speed, and impulse
• Vehicles, weapons, explosives, props, and machinery to combine freely
• Unpredictable outcomes that make every experiment unique
• Suitable for both chaotic action and calm physics observation

Ragdoll Playground Sandbox is a space without limits, where physics drives every outcome. Whether you enjoy experimenting, observing, or creating chaotic scenarios, the game lets you explore interactions freely and enjoy the process at your own pace.
